test_scenarios.description: Search for wireless headphones under $50, collect up to 5 items, add them to cart, and verify the cart total does not exceed the budget.
test_scenarios.expected_results: Cart contains up to 5 wireless headphones, each priced under $50. Cart subtotal does not exceed $250 (5 × $50).
manual_steps: Open https://www.ebay.com
Sign in to eBay (if credentials are configured)
Type 'wireless headphones' in the search bar and press Enter
Browse search results and identify up to 5 items priced under $50
Open each item page, select random variants (size/color/quantity) if present
Click 'Add to Cart' for each item
Navigate to the shopping cart
Verify the cart subtotal does not exceed $250 (5 × $50)

Type 'phone case iPhone' in the search bar and press Enter
Browse search results and identify up to 3 items priced under $20
Open each item page, select random variants (size/color/quantity) if present
Click 'Add to Cart' for each item
Navigate to the shopping cart
Verify the cart subtotal does not exceed $60 (3 × $20)
